news.headline: Is this the beginning of the end for the Metaverse?
news.summary: Five years and more than $80 billion later, Mark Zuckerberg's virtual reality dream seems to be being dismantled, and replaced with equally ambitious AI projects. We take a closer look in this edition of Tech 24.

news.headline: Mustafa Amir murder: Cop shot in 2025 raid on Armaghan’s house succumbs to injuries
news.summary:
<p>KARACHI: A police officer who sustained bullet wounds during a ‘poorly planned’ raid on the house of the main suspect in the <a href="https://www.dawn.com/news/1975884">Mustafa Amir murder case</a> succumbed to his injuries on Monday.</p>
<p>Deputy Inspector General
